templates.name: pdocker Management Workspace + code-server + Codex
templates.description: pdocker management and code-server workspace for project creation and project maintenance, building Dockerfiles, running Compose, using guarded Engine socket helpers, and working with Continue, OpenAI Codex/ChatGPT, and Claude Code.

templates.name: pdocker Direct Runtime Probe
templates.description: Small reusable test container for pdocker-direct argv, shell, proc, and large allocation guard checks without rebuilding large app images.

templates.name: pdocker Test Suite
templates.description: Reusable test-suite container. Start it with Compose, run scenarios through docker exec, and mirror JSON/log evidence to the selected Android Documents folder.

templates.name: llama.cpp GPU workspace
templates.description: llama.cpp server development workspace with pdocker GPU auto-profile generation for Vulkan, CUDA-compatible, or CPU fallback execution.

templates.name: ROS 2 Humble RViz noVNC
templates.description: Ubuntu 22.04 ROS 2 Humble desktop workspace with RViz available through Xvnc and noVNC.

templates.name: Blender Xvnc noVNC
templates.description: Blender desktop template over Xvnc/noVNC for OpenGL and GLSL workload validation, defaulting to Mesa llvmpipe software rendering with future Zink/pdocker Vulkan switches exposed.
